with that thought,
whatsoever He saith unto You, do it.
God, that You would help us
to have the attitude of the psalmist.
Lord, teach me Thy ways.
And then help me to walk in Thy ways.
Help us to fulfill that which we read of in James,
that we would be doers of the Word
and not hearers only.
Work in hearts and lives as only You can.
Use us, Lord, for Your honor and glory.
We'll thank You for it.
In Christ's name we pray.
